   "reasoning": "I'd rather see emergency funding go to desperate kids who are trying to balance work and school than some 'attendance mandate' that assumes all kids just need to 'set their priorities straight'. Counseling programs that don't address the real issues of poverty and lack of resources are pointless. We need concrete support, not feel-good talk.",
